description_long: This is a classic football with a spherical shape, featuring a traditional black and white pattern made up of pentagonal and hexagonal panels. The surface appears to be made of synthetic leather, giving it a slightly textured but smooth finish. The black pentagons and white hexagons are evenly distributed, creating a visually striking and recognizable design. There are no visible logos, text, or branding on the surface, and the seams between the panels are subtle, suggesting a high-quality construction. The ball is likely inflated with air, giving it a firm yet slightly compressible feel. Its size and appearance are consistent with standard footballs used in parks, playgrounds, and urban sports fields.
description: A classic black and white football with a traditional pentagon-hexagon panel pattern and a smooth, slightly textured synthetic leather surface.
description_view_0: The football is shown with a mix of black pentagons and white hexagons, highlighting the classic pattern and subtle surface texture.
description_view_1: This view centers a black pentagonal panel, surrounded by white hexagons, emphasizing the symmetry of the panel arrangement.
description_view_2: The football is rotated to display more white hexagons, with black pentagons partially visible, showing the even distribution of panels.
description_view_3: A black pentagon is prominent at the bottom, with white hexagons above, illustrating the alternating panel design.
